# `!git`

**Category:** files

Clone or update a git repository on the target. Idempotent — compares local HEAD/branch against remote and updates only when needed. SSH key auth only.

## Parameters

| Name | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `repo` | string | yes | Repository URL (https/http or ssh style). |
| `path` | path | yes | Remote destination directory for the checkout. |
| `branch` | string | no | Branch to checkout/switch to. Default main. |
| `ssh_options` | map | no | Map of extra SSH options passed as -o KEY=VALUE. |
| `accept_keys` | bool | no | Auto-accept new SSH host keys via StrictHostKeyChecking=accept-new. Default true. |
| `update` | bool | no | Pull from remote if local HEAD differs. Default true. |
| `attributes` | map | no | File attributes applied to the checkout directory: owner, group, mode. |

## Examples

```yaml
- !git
  repo: git@github.com:example/app.git
  path: /srv/app
  branch: release
  ssh_options:
    IdentityFile: ~/.ssh/deploy_key
```
